title: I need to have a Date on my contact list that will display the of the last email received from the contact.
excerpt: I have tried many times and there is no automation that would say, when email arrives, set date to “today” or when sending a new email, set date to “today” This is very important to track updates and communications with …

posts.author: federicoge1 (Federico Gomez)
posts.cookedHtml: I have tried many times and there is no automation that would say, when email arrives, set date to “today” or when sending a new email, set date to “today” This is very important to track updates and communications with customers and leads.
